summary: Investigated the CI audit failure, upgraded vulnerable dependency roots (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk, inquirer, vitest, vite, and related transitive graph), added pnpm overrides in package.json for unresolved high-severity transitive advisories (hono, @hono/node-server, express-rate-limit, path-to-regexp, minimatch, picomatch), refreshed lockfile, and re-ran audit/build validation.
current_status: High-severity audit issues are resolved: pnpm audit --audit-level=high now exits successfully with only moderate vulnerabilities remaining. Build and webui build pass. Working tree currently includes package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml updates, plus prior pending deletion of 0.6.0-features.md and untracked tmp summary files.
